# kaleido_platform_connector_config_type (Resource)

Ensures a connector config type template is deployed on the target connector service. Config types are bundled with the connector image; this resource pins them to the latest available version and re-deploys/upgrades on apply.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Environment ID
- `name` (String) Name of the config type (e.g. evm.confirmations, btc.feeRate)
- `service` (String) Connector service ID

### Read-Only

- `current_version` (String) The version of the deployed config type template as reported by the connector manager.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
